title: Analyzing myself as a Capricorn - I'm sooo Capricorn! I totally believe in Astrology

transcript.text: Hey, I wanted to do a video analyzing myself as a Capricorn.
Recently I've become interested in astrology, and I really do believe it.
Like, and one reason I really, well, the reason I really, really, really do believe it,
Is that, like, when you hear people describe Capricorns, they really are describing me a lot.
And it's amazing.
So it's cool to have that, like, confirmation of the supernatural.
Because I am such a Capricorn.
It's crazy.
Like, I listen to people talk about describing Capricorns,
And a good person to describe Capricorns is this star goddess.
And she says that, and I, you know, and of course I've done all these other people with Capricorns,
And they all say pretty much the same thing about Capricorns,
In that Capricorns are, like, really, like, hard workers.
And Star Goddess actually said, Capricorns don't know the meaning of fun.
Because they always work.
Because work is fun for them.
And that's me, to a T.
Like, all I do is work.
And my, like, I don't even have any friends, like, where I am right now.
And at this point, I don't even want any friends, ever.
Because it gets in the way of my work.
Like, that's all I want to do.
So, like, as far as, like, projects, you know,
Because I've got all these visions of projects that I want to do.
But the other thing they say about Capricorns, you know,
Is they're the goat that climbed to the top of the mountain.
And they never, ever give up.
And, like, Star Goddess says, you can knock them down, and they just keep going.
And that's exactly how I am.
Like, you know, I'm always working because I can work eternally.
And every project I choose is just ridiculously time-consuming.
But it doesn't matter.
Because I see the project, and I see it being done,
And I have to go there no matter how long it takes me.
And then I get sucked into it.
Like, I'll stop eating.
I'll stop going to the gym or any kind of exercise.
I'll stop cleaning my room.
I'll stop everything.
And all I'll do is the project, because that's all I want to do.
And I'll stay there.
Even if it takes me a million years, I'd stick to it.
And it's like I get sucked into it.
And kind of like Thor drinking the bottomless, out of the bottomless shoe, you know.
So that's because I'm a Capricorn.
And I looked at my chart, which is right there on my YouTube page,
And I have three planets in Capricorn.
So I guess I'm like super Capricorn.
But so that's interesting.
And, I mean, all I want to do is work.
And then the other thing about Capricorn, she says, or that people say that they have bad joints.
That's me.
I have the worst joints ever.
Like, I remember when I was a little kid, like six and seven and eight.
Like, when I was six, I knew the whole story of Achilles.
I knew about how he was dipped into the, like, the liquid of superliquid, but he was held from his Achilles tendon.
So that means that that was the only part of his body that was pervious.
And so that's where he was shot and killed, right there in his Achilles tendon.
Because I, and I knew that's the story because I had a bad left Achilles tendon, and I couldn't really run.
And, you know, and then I had to take six years off of running completely.
You know, I quit Nordic skiing and road bike racing when I was 13 because I had bad knees.
I had Osgood-Schlatter.
And then, you know, I had to go, like, to physical therapy every day after school.
And then, you know, most of the times I go bike touring, my knee goes out.
You know, just the other day I did squats and my knee went out.
And then I tried to run and my knee went out.
And a couple years ago I ran and I pulled my left Achilles tendon and totally pulled it.
And I couldn't run at all for, like, six months.
And, you know, and I still can't run more than, like, three miles a day because of my Achilles tendon.
It hurts.
I just have really bad joints.
And also I read a thing from a, like, a physical therapist, somebody, a person I went to when I was a little kid.
And I read it and they said that I had, like, my ankles were way out of alignment.
So, and then there's the other thing that they say about Capricorns, that they are, they're really serious when they're younger.
And then they get more lighthearted as they get older.
And that's me.
Like, when I was a kid, I was totally serious.
And, oh, for a long time, there was periods where I wasn't, like, when I was six and seven and eight.
But I was, like, really serious.
And I remember even I was thinking, like, somehow it was programmed in my head, like, if I was to act, like, silly, that would mean I'm stupid.
But now I'm, like, totally silly and, you know, not serious or just silly and lighthearted, all that stuff.
And I'll just get more and more liked as I get older.

And the other thing they say is, I guess, you know, the guy from Christopher Witeki from soulgarden.tv, who I watch every single day of the Capricorn, trying to figure out if that's, like, describes how I feel.
And I haven't really figured out if it's true or not yet.
But, you know, he says Capricorns are the captains of the ship, like the bosses.

And, oh, yeah, that's the other thing they say, you know, the Capricorns are, like, the leaders and the businessmen and the rich people and the bosses because all they do is work and they get their goal and they get there.
And, you know, one quality about me is that everything I do, like, I'm a leader, really, at heart because everything I do, I try to bring everybody with me.
Like, everything I learn, I have to make sure everybody else knows it.
And, like, that's why I make so much educational stuff for my website, you know, and I upload so many videos and I'm talking about stuff, trying to explain stuff.
And I think that has to do with kind of, because I think leaders, you know, or business people, they try to bring other people along with them.
And then they're supposed to be, like, really dry, like, not emotional.
And, you know, like she said, just our goddess says, you know, if you go on a, if you have a relationship with a Capricorn, don't expect them to be romantic, but expect them to take care of you.
And that's kind of how, like, I was with my wife.
She was always getting angry with me and accusing me of poco romantico, being, like, not romantic at all.
So, um, but I was really responsible.
And I, you know, I shared a lot with her, so it's kind of interesting.
Um, like, I'm, I'm a Capricorn.
Um, so, anyways, I want to go around and, and, like, I've been looking at other, other signs, too.
And, like, my brother and my dad are Leos.
And I guess Leos are supposed to be, like, you know, lions.
Like, they, they think they're the bosses and they, like, want respect or something and all this stuff.
And that's kind of how they are.
And, uh, and I think, like, my mom's a Sagittarius.
I think Sagittarius is supposed to be, like, really nice or something.
And, you know, they aim for stuff and they go for it, goals.
And my mom's just like that.
So, like, it's really amazing.
It's cool.
I'm starting to really believe in astrology.
And I'm, I want to, like, ask people their signs, you know, people who I know and try and figure out if they're like that.
Um, so, it's pretty cool.
I believe in astrology.
And I'm such a Capricorn.
It's crazy.
